response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience across multiple languages and stacks, with recent direct work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure that maps closely to the role's primary stack and responsibilities. Demonstrates ownership, craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD), and architecture experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
strengths: Direct recent experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent/MCP tooling
Strong polyglot background covering Java and multiple backend stacks
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, and open-source ownership
concerns: Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure appears dated
Cloud experience centers on AWS; no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes-at-scale signal beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: Stack alignment with TypeScript/Node/React + AI agents
